TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Yung-cen "Iyaw a kamu ŗļßŗļĹŗļáŗļąŗļĪŗļô, masaLowma tu, Vieng Chan", Cowng-kow-talu Wan-syang han, u kahenulan satabakiay a tukay nu Liyaw-kow, tini i Yung-cen a kakitizaan, tini i Mey-kong a sa'wac, laed nu Mey-kong a sa'wac atu masasuayaw tu lang-kay-hu nu Tay-kow. śįłÁŹć , . nilaculan 1563 a mihcaan, Lan-cang kanatalay a Say-ta-ti-la a hungti pala kahenulan a tukay, malaliyas tu ku Lan-canng, mala kahenulan a tukay nu Wan-syang a kanatal. 1827 a mihcaan maalaw tu nu Syen-low a hitay, matenes nayi' tu ku mikuwanay macebes tu, katukuh 1899 a mihcaan kya muliyaw pastizeng. kamu nu Lyaw a ngangan nu kitizaan "ŗļßŗļĹŗļáŗļąŗļĪŗļô" nu Alatin niyul han ku sulit Vieng Chan, kanatalay a ngiha " č√≠…ôŇč t…ē√†n" midebungay nu Ba-kow duduc tu kamu nu Ba-kow u nanam misulit Vientiane han. "ŗļßŗļĹŗļá" "Vieng" u sicabengay a niyazu' sa ku imi, "ŗļąŗļĪŗļô" "Chan" u "sibuladay" atu " Tan-mu" sayay a imi, uyni cudad nu Lyaway makayzaay madayumay tu sulid nu cudad. ŚĮģŤ™ěšł≠ŚúįŚźć"ŗļßŗļĹŗļáŗļąŗļĪŗļô"ÁöĄśčČšłĀŤĹČŚĮęÁāļVieng Chan,Śúčťöõťü≥ś®ô( č√≠…ôŇč t…ē√†n), Vientiane."ŗļßŗļĹŗļá"(Vieng)śėĮ"śúČŚüéÁČÜÁöĄŚüé"ÁöĄśĄŹśÄĚ,"ŗļąŗļĪŗļô"(Chan) . nikaawas tahkal nu piazih atu sulit nu Lyaw miseng tu sulit nu Tay, patatenga' ŗļąŗļĪŗļô nu Tan-mu "ŗłąŗłĪŗłôŗłóŗłôŗĻĆ" cayay ku bulad "ŗłąŗłĪŗłôŗłóŗł£ŗĻĆ" sakasa "Yung-cen" a imi u Tan tukay han. zuma, makayzaay i Ban a sulit ŗ§öŗ§®ŗ•ćŗ§¶ŗ§®ŗ§ģŗ•ć, u imi Tan-mu han, kasumamadan a sulit nu Cong-kow pabelin u "Can- Tan han", yan i kamu nu Layak u cabeng sa, u niyazu' han, namahiza iza ku migikiway uyni nipabelinan a ngangan "yen can" han. "Śě£ś†ī". Yung-cen i cudad nu Cong-kow mapangangan cow-own-tan, yung-tyan. Yen-nan a nisulita "tana-s-lu" u yen-cen "Yen-nan a kamu, Vi√™ng ChńÉn/ Yen-cen", Wan-syang "Yen-nan a kamu, VŠļ°n T∆įŠĽ£ng/wan-syang". (Ť∂äŚćóŤ™ě:Vi√™ng ChńÉnÔľŹŚúďÁ¶õ),Ťź¨ŤĪ°(Ť∂äŚćóŤ™ě:VŠļ°n T∆įŠĽ£ngÔľŹŤź¨ŤĪ°). likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ caay kahapinang ku saayaway a likisi nu Yung-cen, hakay ayaw nu kung-yen tu 4 se-ci masanga'ay tu. 1354 a m kihcaan Ba-ang patizeng tu Lan-cang a kanatal zikuz, Yung-cen mala u kahenulan a sakawawan nu tukay, nika caay ku caay ku angangan nu tukay. acaay cumudan nu men-ten, Say-ta-ti-la a hungti i 1560 a mihcaan anganng nu tukay makay Mung-su-wa "nu ayzaay Lang-pow-la-pang" mabulaw tayza i Yung-cen, satu mala u angangan tu nu Lang-cang. 1707 a mihcaan, Lang-cang a kanatal malaliyas mala u Lang-pow-la-pang, Wan-syang can-pa tulu a kanatalan, zuma Wan-syang a kanatal u angangangan nu Yungcen. 1779 a mihcaan Syan-low midebung i Lyaw-kow, Wan-syang a kanatal mala adidi'ay tu nu Syan-low. saayaway tu 19 a seci, Wan-syang a hungti Caw-a-nu palekal tu hitay paculi tu Syan-low Wan-syang a kanatal, belbelan masaenal tu ku Yung-cen, zuma a tademaw, zaysang, samiya mahamin maalaw patayzaen i Syan-low. satu caay ku Si-sa-ke-s dada' uzuma a s-yen iza henay, nayi' tu ku mikuwanay macebes tu. 19šłĖÁīÄŚąĚ, . ayaw tu 20 a se-ci, midebungay nu Ba-kow sakapah han misanga' ku Yung-cen, misapinang mala Liya nu mipupuay tu kanatal a tatenga'ay angangan nu kanatal, u nipalekal angangan nu Lang-pow-la-pang, Lyaw a hungti pacena' i Lang-pow-la-pang a mueneng. 19975 a mihcaan zikuz mapabelin ku Lyaw a kanatal, Yung-cen mala tademaw tu nu Lyaw angangan nu kanatal u tademaw amin ku situngusay nu kanatal. lala' ŚúįÁźÜ Yung-cen u hamin nu kanatal u cayay kakatuud nipatizeng i capi nu kanatalay a angangan nu kanatal. tini i teban a sa'wac nu Mey-kung, laed tu sa'wac nu Mey-kung caay kakatukuh i 1,600 kung-li, Yung-cen nu Lyaw a kanatalay a cen-ce, keyzay, saculilan. tukayay a tademaw pakala tu 70 a emaw "2005 a mihcaan", pasu lilisay a kitizaan pakala tu 73 a emang ku tademaw. 73Ťź¨šļļ. malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == juŇč- ¶…ôn "ijaw a kamu ******, masar~…ĺowma tu, *i…ôŇč ¶ńßan", ¶owŇč-kow-tar~…ĺu wan-sjaŇč ńßan, u kańß…ônur~…ĺan satabakiaj a tukaj nu r~…ĺijaw-kow, tini i juŇč- ¶…ôn a kakitizaan, tini i m…ô-koŇč a sa Ē~ °wa ¶, r~…ĺa…ôd nu m…ô-koŇč a sa Ē~ °wa ¶ atu masasuajaw tu r~…ĺaŇč-kaj-ńßu nu taj-kow. ** , . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan **** a mińß ¶aan, r~…ĺan- ¶aŇč kanatar~…ĺaj a saj-ta-ti-r~…ĺa a ńßuŇčti par~…ĺa kańß…ônur~…ĺan a tukaj, mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas tu ku r~…ĺan- ¶anŇč, mar~…ĺa kańß…ônur~…ĺan a tukaj nu wan-sjaŇč a kanatar~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶aan maar~…ĺaw tu nu sj…ôn-r~…ĺow a ńßitaj, mat…ôn…ôs naji Ē~ ° tu ku mikuwanaj ma ¶…ôb…ôs tu, katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan kja mur~…ĺijaw pastiz…ôŇč. kamu nu r~…ĺjaw a ŇčaŇčan nu kitizaan "******" nu ar~…ĺatin nijur~…ĺ ńßan ku sur~…ĺit *i…ôŇč ¶ńßan, kanatar~…ĺaj a Ňčińßa "**…ôŇč t**n" mid…ôbuŇčaj nu ba-kow dudu ¶ tu kamu nu ba-kow u nanam misur~…ĺit *i…ôntian…ô ńßan. "***" "*i…ôŇč" u si ¶ab…ôŇčaj a nijazu Ē~ ° sa ku imi, "***" " ¶ńßan" u "sibur~…ĺadaj" atu " tan-mu" sajaj a imi, ujni ¶udad nu r~…ĺjawaj makajzaaj madajumaj tu sur~…ĺid nu ¶udad. *****"******"*******i…ôŇč ¶ńßan,****(**…ôŇč t**n), *i…ôntian…ô."***"(*i…ôŇč)*"*****"***,"***"( ¶ńßan) . nikaawas tańßkar~…ĺ nu piazińß atu sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺjaw mis…ôŇč tu sur~…ĺit nu taj, patat…ôŇča Ē~ ° *** nu tan-mu "******" ¶ajaj ku bur~…ĺad "******" sakasa "juŇč- ¶…ôn" a imi u tan tukaj ńßan. zuma, makajzaaj i ban a sur~…ĺit *******, u imi tan-mu ńßan, kasumamadan a sur~…ĺit nu ¶oŇč-kow pab…ôr~…ĺin u " ¶an- tan ńßan", jan i kamu nu r~…ĺajak u ¶ab…ôŇč sa, u nijazu Ē~ ° ńßan, namańßiza iza ku migikiwaj ujni nipab…ôr~…ĺinan a ŇčaŇčan "j…ôn ¶an" ńßan. "**". juŇč- ¶…ôn i ¶udad nu ¶oŇč-kow mapaŇčaŇčan ¶ow-own-tan, juŇč-tjan. j…ôn-nan a nisur~…ĺita "tana-s-r~…ĺu" u j…ôn- ¶…ôn "j…ôn-nan a kamu, *i*Ňč ¶ńß*n/ j…ôn- ¶…ôn", wan-sjaŇč "j…ôn-nan a kamu, **n t**Ňč/wan-sjaŇč". (***:*i*Ňč ¶ńß*n***),**(***:**n t**Ňč***). r~…ĺikisi ** ¶aaj kańßapinaŇč ku saajawaj a r~…ĺikisi nu juŇč- ¶…ôn, ńßakaj ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn tu * s…ô- ¶i masaŇča Ē~ °aj tu. **** a m kińß ¶aan ba-aŇč patiz…ôŇč tu r~…ĺan- ¶aŇč a kanatar~…ĺ zikuz, juŇč- ¶…ôn mar~…ĺa u kańß…ônur~…ĺan a sakawawan nu tukaj, nika ¶aaj ku ¶aaj ku aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj. a ¶aaj ¶umudan nu m…ôn-t…ôn, saj-ta-ti-r~…ĺa a ńßuŇčti i **** a mińß ¶aan aŇčanŇč nu tukaj makaj muŇč-su-wa "nu ajzaaj r~…ĺaŇč-pow-r~…ĺa-paŇč" mabur~…ĺaw tajza i juŇč- ¶…ôn, satu mar~…ĺa u aŇčaŇčan tu nu r~…ĺaŇč- ¶aŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan, r~…ĺaŇč- ¶aŇč a kanatar~…ĺ mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas mar~…ĺa u r~…ĺaŇč-pow-r~…ĺa-paŇč, wan-sjaŇč ¶an-pa tur~…ĺu a kanatar~…ĺan, zuma wan-sjaŇč a kanatar~…ĺ u aŇčaŇčaŇčan nu juŇč ¶…ôn. **** a mińß ¶aan sjan-r~…ĺow mid…ôbuŇč i r~…ĺjaw-kow, wan-sjaŇč a kanatar~…ĺ mar~…ĺa adidi Ē~ °aj tu nu sjan-r~…ĺow. saajawaj tu ** a s…ô ¶i, wan-sjaŇč a ńßuŇčti ¶aw-a-nu par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu ńßitaj pa ¶ur~…ĺi tu sjan-r~…ĺow wan-sjaŇč a kanatar~…ĺ, b…ôr~…ĺb…ôr~…ĺan masa…ônar~…ĺ tu ku juŇč- ¶…ôn, zuma a tad…ômaw, zajsaŇč, samija mańßamin maar~…ĺaw patajza…ôn i sjan-r~…ĺow. satu ¶aaj ku si-sa-k…ô-s dada Ē~ ° uzuma a s-j…ôn iza ńß…ônaj, naji Ē~ ° tu ku mikuwanaj ma ¶…ôb…ôs tu. *****, . ajaw tu ** a s…ô- ¶i, mid…ôbuŇčaj nu ba-kow sakapańß ńßan misaŇča Ē~ ° ku juŇč- ¶…ôn, misapinaŇč mar~…ĺa r~…ĺija nu mipupuaj tu kanatar~…ĺ a tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj aŇčaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ, u nipar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ aŇčaŇčan nu r~…ĺaŇč-pow-r~…ĺa-paŇč, r~…ĺjaw a ńßuŇčti pa ¶…ôna Ē~ ° i r~…ĺaŇč-pow-r~…ĺa-paŇč a mu…ôn…ôŇč. ***** a mińß ¶aan zikuz mapab…ôr~…ĺin ku r~…ĺjaw a kanatar~…ĺ, juŇč- ¶…ôn mar~…ĺa tad…ômaw tu nu r~…ĺjaw aŇčaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ u tad…ômaw amin ku situŇčusaj nu kanatar~…ĺ. r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ** juŇč- ¶…ôn u ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ u ¶ajaj kakatuud nipatiz…ôŇč i ¶api nu kanatar~…ĺaj a aŇčaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ. tini i t…ôban a sa Ē~ °wa ¶ nu m…ô-kuŇč, r~…ĺa…ôd tu sa Ē~ °wa ¶ nu m…ô-kuŇč ¶aaj kakatukuńß i *,*** kuŇč-r~…ĺi, juŇč- ¶…ôn nu r~…ĺjaw a kanatar~…ĺaj a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, k…ôzaj, sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan. tukajaj a tad…ômaw pakar~…ĺa tu ** a …ômaw "**** a mińß ¶aan", pasu r~…ĺir~…ĺisaj a kitizaan pakar~…ĺa tu ** a …ômaŇč ku tad…ômaw. ****. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Yung-cen "Iyaw a kamu ŗļßŗļĹŗļáŗļąŗļĪŗļô, masaLowma tu, Vieng Chan", Cowng-kow-talu Wan-syang han, u kahenulan satabakiay a tukay nu Liyaw-kow, tini i Yung-cen a kakitizaan, tini i Mey-kong a sa'wac, laed nu Mey-kong a sa'wac atu masasuayaw tu lang-kay-hu nu Tay-kow. śįłÁŹć , . nilaculan 1563 a mihcaan, Lan-cang kanatalay a Say-ta-ti-la a hungti pala kahenulan a tukay, malaliyas tu ku Lan-canng, mala kahenulan a tukay nu Wan-syang a kanatal. 1827 a mihcaan maalaw tu nu Syen-low a hitay, matenes nayi' tu ku mikuwanay macebes tu, katukuh 1899 a mihcaan kya muliyaw pastizeng. kamu nu Lyaw a ngangan nu kitizaan "ŗļßŗļĹŗļáŗļąŗļĪŗļô" nu Alatin niyul han ku sulit Vieng Chan, kanatalay a ngiha " č√≠…ôŇč t…ē√†n" midebungay nu Ba-kow duduc tu kamu nu Ba-kow u nanam misulit Vientiane han. "ŗļßŗļĹŗļá" "Vieng" u sicabengay a niyazu' sa ku imi, "ŗļąŗļĪŗļô" "Chan" u "sibuladay" atu " Tan-mu" sayay a imi, uyni cudad nu Lyaway makayzaay madayumay tu sulid nu cudad. ŚĮģŤ™ěšł≠ŚúįŚźć"ŗļßŗļĹŗļáŗļąŗļĪŗļô"ÁöĄśčČšłĀŤĹČŚĮęÁāļVieng Chan,Śúčťöõťü≥ś®ô( č√≠…ôŇč t…ē√†n), Vientiane."ŗļßŗļĹŗļá"(Vieng)śėĮ"śúČŚüéÁČÜÁöĄŚüé"ÁöĄśĄŹśÄĚ,"ŗļąŗļĪŗļô"(Chan) . nikaawas tahkal nu piazih atu sulit nu Lyaw miseng tu sulit nu Tay, patatenga' ŗļąŗļĪŗļô nu Tan-mu "ŗłąŗłĪŗłôŗłóŗłôŗĻĆ" cayay ku bulad "ŗłąŗłĪŗłôŗłóŗł£ŗĻĆ" sakasa "Yung-cen" a imi u Tan tukay han. zuma, makayzaay i Ban a sulit ŗ§öŗ§®ŗ•ćŗ§¶ŗ§®ŗ§ģŗ•ć, u imi Tan-mu han, kasumamadan a sulit nu Cong-kow pabelin u "Can- Tan han", yan i kamu nu Layak u cabeng sa, u niyazu' han, namahiza iza ku migikiway uyni nipabelinan a ngangan "yen can" han. "Śě£ś†ī". Yung-cen i cudad nu Cong-kow mapangangan cow-own-tan, yung-tyan. Yen-nan a nisulita "tana-s-lu" u yen-cen "Yen-nan a kamu, Vi√™ng ChńÉn/ Yen-cen", Wan-syang "Yen-nan a kamu, VŠļ°n T∆įŠĽ£ng/wan-syang". (Ť∂äŚćóŤ™ě:Vi√™ng ChńÉnÔľŹŚúďÁ¶õ),Ťź¨ŤĪ°(Ť∂äŚćóŤ™ě:VŠļ°n T∆įŠĽ£ngÔľŹŤź¨ŤĪ°). likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ caay kahapinang ku saayaway a likisi nu Yung-cen, hakay ayaw nu kung-yen tu 4 se-ci masanga'ay tu. 1354 a m kihcaan Ba-ang patizeng tu Lan-cang a kanatal zikuz, Yung-cen mala u kahenulan a sakawawan nu tukay, nika caay ku caay ku angangan nu tukay. acaay cumudan nu men-ten, Say-ta-ti-la a hungti i 1560 a mihcaan anganng nu tukay makay Mung-su-wa "nu ayzaay Lang-pow-la-pang" mabulaw tayza i Yung-cen, satu mala u angangan tu nu Lang-cang. 1707 a mihcaan, Lang-cang a kanatal malaliyas mala u Lang-pow-la-pang, Wan-syang can-pa tulu a kanatalan, zuma Wan-syang a kanatal u angangangan nu Yungcen. 1779 a mihcaan Syan-low midebung i Lyaw-kow, Wan-syang a kanatal mala adidi'ay tu nu Syan-low. saayaway tu 19 a seci, Wan-syang a hungti Caw-a-nu palekal tu hitay paculi tu Syan-low Wan-syang a kanatal, belbelan masaenal tu ku Yung-cen, zuma a tademaw, zaysang, samiya mahamin maalaw patayzaen i Syan-low. satu caay ku Si-sa-ke-s dada' uzuma a s-yen iza henay, nayi' tu ku mikuwanay macebes tu. 19šłĖÁīÄŚąĚ, . ayaw tu 20 a se-ci, midebungay nu Ba-kow sakapah han misanga' ku Yung-cen, misapinang mala Liya nu mipupuay tu kanatal a tatenga'ay angangan nu kanatal, u nipalekal angangan nu Lang-pow-la-pang, Lyaw a hungti pacena' i Lang-pow-la-pang a mueneng. 19975 a mihcaan zikuz mapabelin ku Lyaw a kanatal, Yung-cen mala tademaw tu nu Lyaw angangan nu kanatal u tademaw amin ku situngusay nu kanatal. lala' ŚúįÁźÜ Yung-cen u hamin nu kanatal u cayay kakatuud nipatizeng i capi nu kanatalay a angangan nu kanatal. tini i teban a sa'wac nu Mey-kung, laed tu sa'wac nu Mey-kung caay kakatukuh i 1,600 kung-li, Yung-cen nu Lyaw a kanatalay a cen-ce, keyzay, saculilan. tukayay a tademaw pakala tu 70 a emaw "2005 a mihcaan", pasu lilisay a kitizaan pakala tu 73 a emang ku tademaw. 73Ťź¨šļļ. malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

"***" "*i…ôŇč" u si ¶ab…ôŇčaj a nijazu Ē~ ° sa ku imi, "***" " ¶ńßan" u "sibur~…ĺadaj" atu " tan-mu" sajaj a imi, ujni ¶udad nu r~…ĺjawaj makajzaaj madajumaj tu sur~…ĺid nu ¶udad. *****"******"*******i…ôŇč ¶ńßan,****(**…ôŇč t**n), *i…ôntian…ô."***"(*i…ôŇč)*"*****"***,"***"( ¶ńßan) . nikaawas tańßkar~…ĺ nu piazińß atu sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺjaw mis…ôŇč tu sur~…ĺit nu taj, patat…ôŇča Ē~ ° *** nu tan-mu "******" ¶ajaj ku bur~…ĺad "******" sakasa "juŇč- ¶…ôn" a imi u tan tukaj ńßan. zuma, makajzaaj i ban a sur~…ĺit *******, u imi tan-mu ńßan, kasumamadan a sur~…ĺit nu ¶oŇč-kow pab…ôr~…ĺin u " ¶an- tan ńßan", jan i kamu nu r~…ĺajak u ¶ab…ôŇč sa, u nijazu Ē~ ° ńßan, namańßiza iza ku migikiwaj ujni nipab…ôr~…ĺinan a ŇčaŇčan "j…ôn ¶an" ńßan. "**". juŇč- ¶…ôn i ¶udad nu ¶oŇč-kow mapaŇčaŇčan ¶ow-own-tan, juŇč-tjan. j…ôn-nan a nisur~…ĺita "tana-s-r~…ĺu" u j…ôn- ¶…ôn "j…ôn-nan a kamu, *i*Ňč ¶ńß*n/ j…ôn- ¶…ôn", wan-sjaŇč "j…ôn-nan a kamu, **n t**Ňč/wan-sjaŇč". (***:*i*Ňč ¶ńß*n***),**(***:**n t**Ňč***). r~…ĺikisi ** ¶aaj kańßapinaŇč ku saajawaj a r~…ĺikisi nu juŇč- ¶…ôn, ńßakaj ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn tu * s…ô- ¶i masaŇča Ē~ °aj tu. **** a m kińß ¶aan ba-aŇč patiz…ôŇč tu r~…ĺan- ¶aŇč a kanatar~…ĺ zikuz, juŇč- ¶…ôn mar~…ĺa u kańß…ônur~…ĺan a sakawawan nu tukaj, nika ¶aaj ku ¶aaj ku aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj. a ¶aaj ¶umudan nu m…ôn-t…ôn, saj-ta-ti-r~…ĺa a ńßuŇčti i **** a mińß ¶aan aŇčanŇč nu tukaj makaj muŇč-su-wa "nu ajzaaj r~…ĺaŇč-pow-r~…ĺa-paŇč" mabur~…ĺaw tajza i juŇč- ¶…ôn, satu mar~…ĺa u aŇčaŇčan tu nu r~…ĺaŇč- ¶aŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan, r~…ĺaŇč- ¶aŇč a kanatar~…ĺ mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas mar~…ĺa u r~…ĺaŇč-pow-r~…ĺa-paŇč, wan-sjaŇč ¶an-pa tur~…ĺu a kanatar~…ĺan, zuma wan-sjaŇč a kanatar~…ĺ u aŇčaŇčaŇčan nu juŇč ¶…ôn. **** a mińß ¶aan sjan-r~…ĺow mid…ôbuŇč i r~…ĺjaw-kow, wan-sjaŇč a kanatar~…ĺ mar~…ĺa adidi Ē~ °aj tu nu sjan-r~…ĺow. saajawaj tu ** a s…ô ¶i, wan-sjaŇč a ńßuŇčti ¶aw-a-nu par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu ńßitaj pa ¶ur~…ĺi tu sjan-r~…ĺow wan-sjaŇč a kanatar~…ĺ, b…ôr~…ĺb…ôr~…ĺan masa…ônar~…ĺ tu ku juŇč- ¶…ôn, zuma a tad…ômaw, zajsaŇč, samija mańßamin maar~…ĺaw patajza…ôn i sjan-r~…ĺow. satu ¶aaj ku si-sa-k…ô-s dada Ē~ ° uzuma a s-j…ôn iza ńß…ônaj, naji Ē~ ° tu ku mikuwanaj ma ¶…ôb…ôs tu. *****, . ajaw tu ** a s…ô- ¶i, mid…ôbuŇčaj nu ba-kow sakapańß ńßan misaŇča Ē~ ° ku juŇč- ¶…ôn, misapinaŇč mar~…ĺa r~…ĺija nu mipupuaj tu kanatar~…ĺ a tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj aŇčaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ, u nipar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ aŇčaŇčan nu r~…ĺaŇč-pow-r~…ĺa-paŇč, r~…ĺjaw a ńßuŇčti pa ¶…ôna Ē~ ° i r~…ĺaŇč-pow-r~…ĺa-paŇč a mu…ôn…ôŇč. ***** a mińß ¶aan zikuz mapab…ôr~…ĺin ku r~…ĺjaw a kanatar~…ĺ, juŇč- ¶…ôn mar~…ĺa tad…ômaw tu nu r~…ĺjaw aŇčaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ u tad…ômaw amin ku situŇčusaj nu kanatar~…ĺ. r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ** juŇč- ¶…ôn u ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ u ¶ajaj kakatuud nipatiz…ôŇč i ¶api nu kanatar~…ĺaj a aŇčaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ. tini i t…ôban a sa Ē~ °wa ¶ nu m…ô-kuŇč, r~…ĺa…ôd tu sa Ē~ °wa ¶ nu m…ô-kuŇč ¶aaj kakatukuńß i *,*** kuŇč-r~…ĺi, juŇč- ¶…ôn nu r~…ĺjaw a kanatar~…ĺaj a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, k…ôzaj, sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan. tukajaj a tad…ômaw pakar~…ĺa tu ** a …ômaw "**** a mińß ¶aan", pasu r~…ĺir~…ĺisaj a kitizaan pakar~…ĺa tu ** a …ômaŇč ku tad…ômaw. ****. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
